name: local-llm skill emits a token-cost reduction estimate when reporting on routed operations
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/local-llm && printf '{"routed_operations":[{"op":"triage","tokens_avoided":1500},{"op":"affiliation-parsing","tokens_avoided":900}]}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/local-llm/stats.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/local-llm/cost-report.sh" --stats .claude-tdd-pro/local-llm/stats.json 2>out.txt && grep -qE 'tokens_avoided=2400' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
